title: Current active focus
summary: Current focus is B4 brain/context integration after B3.2 proof.
body: Current project focus: implement B4 XV7 brain/context integration with canonical schema, loader, context assembly, compact receipts, and pass-question behavior verified through local chat path.

facts.statement: We are working on B4 brain/context integration.
B3.2 launch proof is complete before B4 work.

evidence: User baseline explicitly states B3.2 launch polish has been implemented and passing.
